narrative:
Lake 9 (precinct in Stark County) has 838 registered voters, with 60.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 21.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 18.3%, a modest Republican lean of 3.3 percentage points.
